title: Visal Adare
overview: Visal Adare promises an enchanting and emotional movie experience, exploring the depths of love, friendship and forgiveness. Be captivated by the mesmerizing story of Thaadi, Shavin, Sarah and Anud; as their destinies intertwine in a tale that will stay with you long after the credits roll.
